name: Titanium Toolbox
description: Filled with small compartments that are perfect for storing engineering devices.

name: Nolkai's Bag
description: Despite its long time buried in the earth, this bag seems nearly new.

name: Tattered Hexcloth Sack
description: Made of cloth patches from the depths of Zul'Aman.

name: Elementium Toolbox
description: Possibly the finest toolbox ever made, embellished with gold inlay.

description: Made of cloth patches from the depths of Zul'Aman.

description: Requires Huojin Pandaren - Revered

description: Requires Tushui Pandaren - Revered

name: Addie's Ink-Stained Satchel
description: Big enough to hold multiple manuscripts.

name: Reusable Tote Bag
description: Covered in tasefully vintage-feeling Smokywood Pastures logos.

name: Madman's Luggage
description: A mysterious container that is far larger on the inside than it has any right to be.

name: Admiralty Marine's Duffel
description: With disciplined packing you can fit more in the same space.

name: Pack of Many Pockets
description: When you carry everything on your back, you need as many pockets as you can get.

name: Emptied First Aid Kit
description: A useful carrying case for supplies, even if no medkits are left.

name: Tattered Leather Bag
description: Best not to think too hard about the materials involved.

name: Portable Pocket Dimension
description: No matter how heavy the contents, this bag's shape and weight never seem to change.

name: Satchel of Security
description: A false bag to misdirect intrusive hands.

name: Horadric Haversack
description: This could hold one big stash!

name: Goblin Mini Fridge
description: Keeps the Kaja'Cola cool and you even cooler.

name: Concoctor's Clutch
description: Taut threads perfectly protect its inhabitants from experiments gone wrong.

name: Ignition Satchel
description: Imbued with Everburning Ignition, sets a Blacksmith's heart ablaze.

name: Hideshaper's Workbag
description: This workbag contains numerous compartments and pouches to hold various odds, ends, and specialty items.

name: Magically "Infinite" Messenger
description: Rumors of its infiniteness have been greatly exaggerated.

name: Prodigy's Toolbox
description: A container of effortless genius.

name: Darkmoon Duffle
description: A compartment of mysteries and intrigue.

name: Gardener's Seed Satchel
description: Lingering magic radiates from the satchel, granting you a closer connection with the natural magics of Khaz Algar.

name: Excavator's Haversack
description: Dusty, but durable.

name: Jeweler's Purse
description: Malleable threads make just enough space for rough edges.

name: The Severed Satchel
description: A container spun from The Weaver's master artisans, capable of maximizing the value of cloth as elusive as Dawnweave and Duskweave.

name: Hideseeker's Tote
description: This spacious tote comes equipped with a state-of-the-art knife holster utilizing an ironclaw sharpener.
